text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Huh. So what happened to that crying girl you
were talking about?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Weeell, she seemed super depressy, so I was like
"Whoa, girl, you good?"

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: But she was not. I thought I was gonna have to build a boat and paddle my way through the tears. So I thought, okay, we need to change the vibe—with karaoke!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Theeen, we went to the beach and screamed into
the horizon! She said she felt all her cares melt
away!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's a typical hangout for us! If one of us
loses a race and needs a pick-me-up, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: So, it sounds like you cheered her up!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I saw her happily teaching just now when I
passed by her classroom.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. You were talking about a teacher?!
